title: Integrate the Metadata from Stripe to Monday
excerpt: Our team processes payments for experiences and donations. To understand the preferences someone has we have them fill out questions in their submission and the answers to those questions appear in the metadata in Stripe…

posts.author: KassidyH (Kassidy Hancey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team processes payments for experiences and donations. To understand the preferences someone has we have them fill out questions in their submission and the answers to those questions appear in the metadata in Stripe.
Right now there’s no way to integrate that field into Monday. I’d love to have that as an option, and then if we needed we could create a formula to separate the data into multiple working fields in Monday.
